reviews.review_description: The game is so fun and mentally exhausting. I do have some suggestions to make it better. Tell us the date when the seasonal event is actually coming out, I keep seeing “stay tuned” but I want to know it. Also let us play the seasonal events when it not the right time but give us no rewards. I finished all the levels and I want more. I’m close to completing every achievement.

I’m not afraid of heights and while I’ve never done any vertical rock climbing, I have climbed a few mountains.  I started out playing in easy mode and I was terrified to  fall. I was literally chanting  not real. It’s not real T￼hen I switched  to professional mode and I fell clike 30 times in the first five minutes which finally convinced my subconscious mind that it wasn’t real. My only problem with the game is that I feel like I’m at a huge disadvantage because I have short arms lol
So I previously played the free trial of the game, but yesterday I got horizon plus as this game was included and now it’s telling me I’m unable to play cause the free trial is up
The game is epic don't get me wrong but why can't I connect to the server I feel like iv been shafted what's going on? Would of given 5star but no server no stars 👎

reviews.review_title: A visual gem with polished level design
reviews.review_description: I keep revisiting The Climb 2 every now and then. I like to play with wrist weights and listen Youtube music in the background. It is a top experience. The levels are visually stunning and the mechanics are well thought-through. You can play casual, without stamina at your own pace enjoying the journey, or go full sweat playing without chalking and challenging yourself to complete the level without failing or stopping.

I love the events but I was wondering why it was take so long to find them and why don’t it save what we found after we get off of it it not fair. They expect us to play all day. I know I found 100 eggs so far but it doesn’t even count. That the all part that sucks. But all of all it is a fun game to play and I wish there were a way to turn off the snake and the wolf
Makes you phase through every object can’t grab a hold either

I love this game because it’s really like really fun it makes me really like joyful and like it pushes me to a limit and it no game has a height of scaredness but if you try it’s worth it because when you get out of it, you know your come send something and when when you look at the game, you can see over details, but when I played it for the first time it was the most beautiful views in it and it’s the best climbing game. You can play right now in 2026 but but you need to be brave and you need to be like really good at the game but you can train also but you just have to be really really lazy really like convinced you can do it but remember it’s just a VR game but but it’s like the best experience you game. I think it’s worlds best game but climb two is like most joyful and fun. I think it’s even better than I thought

I highly recommend that you get this game it is one of the best vr experiences the graphics and environments are absolutely stunning. The climbing feels great and the jumping between rocks is awesome. I love the small little details like the animals and at the end the little things that happen are awesome. I also love the expressions especially whenever I beat a level his cheer of joy always brought a smile to my face. I found myself gaping at the huge mountains and it's really made me want to go out and see nature. There are a lot of paths so it feels like there is always a new way to go. The only thing I wish is that there were more levels because I've beat almost all of them in one day and I would like to see controller vibrations. Anyways thank you devs for this masterpiece.

This is on my top 10 list for favorite VR games, its a very active game and after a few climbs your arms get kind of sore, but besides that it' s overall just a very enjoyable and realistic experience. Definitely worth the price in my opinion and I would recommend to all players, weather you're brand new to VR or you've been playing for a while it's very easy to understand and follow, but also provides a fun challenge.
The game offers real life vibes of climbing and if you like climbing in real life this game is perfect for you. And if youre scared of heights you should try this to not be scared of heights anymore
This game made me fell cozy but with adralin
Ok game but don't buy it not 30$ kind of good

I bought this game a while ago and I was addicted to it, now later I just remembered about it and I’m now replaying every level and it’s still fun trying to beat your record times and get the fastest possible time, I just achieved the golden equipment by beating every level in professional mode and I love how you get more equipment by beating levels, this game is fun and you can keep replaying the levels because there is multiple paths to make it to the end and avoiding the snakes in canyons is fun but overall this game is fun and exceeded my expectations with graphics and gameplay and would 100% recommend if your looking into it.

The climb and the climb 2 (just get the bundle) are both amazing games. I have my fingers crossed for a climb 3 but sadly I don't think we will get one. I have played both for countless hours and they were two of the first games I bought years ago when quest 2 first launched. They are both five stars and very fun. It's a climbing simulation game that requires quick thinking, spacial awareness, and confidence.
I used to be deathly afraid of heights. When I got these games and first started playing my knees would buckle when I looked down. I would feel nauseous and get vertigo. Not from motion sickness but the crippling fear of heights I had dealt with since I was a kid. But I kept playing and in time I could look down. Eventually I wanted to look down. Because I could. I could do it and not feel fear. It was so empowering to face that fear because I'm not afraid of heights anymore. Irl I can go on rides and go places that I would have never done before when I was afraid of heights.
This game showed me that VR was more than games. They were experiences. They could enrich one's life as well as be recreational. So this game, because the city levels are what really shine for me. Will always have a special place in my life. I recommend the climb series to anyone. They are done very well and are classic vr titles.
Love the views and challenges
this game is one of the best games i've ever played this game should be awarded the most in history i really love this game i do not understand people who doesn't like this game
This is problably the best experience i have ever had on vr the mechanics are good the graphics are amazing it feels real and also its super fun i wish i could rate 1000 stars

reviews.review_title: A great game, let down by bugs on the 3s
reviews.review_description:
The game is great, really immersive etc. I really wanted the online leaderboards etc but it absolutely refuses to connect etc. I've tried different WiFi networks, hard rebooting the headset, even clearing app data. Nothing works. 

So annoying.

reviews.review_title: This game is not worth thirty dollars.
reviews.review_description: The game looks good. the tutorial just feels to hard.i don't know if it is just me but I just don't like the game. For some reason it is kind of hard to move on the wall . You can git if you want. but it is just not for me.

As someone who loves climbing but isn’t really physically cut out to do it, this is the perfect app for me. The levels are well made and the climbing mechanic itself is very smooth. I really hope they add more levels sometime soon, as the first game just has an overall slower feel, at least from what I can tell from the free trial. If you’re considering getting this I would highly recommend it.

I wish there was a PC version because the Climb 1 on PC was and still is amazeballs. Quite an experience with top tier graphics. 

That said, I was surprised at how much I enjoyed the Climb 2 on standalone. Once I got over the graphics, btw I got over it quickly, the gameplay was just as good as the first. I loved it and beat all the levels. 

No Quest 3 update so- use QGO for those who know.
I really like the game on how peacefully it is and cool and kinda like a work out
I am Bezalel, the grandson of my late grandpa, sincethisonebegan, anyway the vr headset is fine👍

This is a pretty solid game, I enjoy climbing and stuff, my only critique is that only having hands and not arms takes away the realism for me, which kinda ruins the game because of how gorgeous is it.

reviews.review_title: I WOULD RATE THIS 10 STARS IF I COULD
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun I can not get bored you climb into amazing views and amazing climbs. GET THIS GAME NOW!

One thing I want to get out of VR is to experience things I wouldn’t be able to in real life. This game definitely achieves that.  The discomfort I felt while playing this exceeded anything I’ve ever felt in VR. I’ll never know what it feels like to hang from a mountain in real life, but this game is convincing enough to provide just a fraction of that terror, which is good enough for me.
It's a cool and fun game. It has a real look to it with animals. It will make you sweat, and I will stretch before playing. You can sit down and play too great for the disable.
I hadn’t played the game for two hours or had it for 14 days and it still won’t let me refund it and the thing is this game is so boring

This game is absolutely amazing beautiful grafics so realistic and fun I could play this for hours so fun I recommend this if your looking for a fun and worth it climbing game the climb 2 is the one I also recommend the climb 1 it is also just as good the climb 2 just has better grafics 1000 percent worth buying buy now to have the most awesome and fun climbing experience!!! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 10000000000000000% worth it
The controls are easy to grasp, and the experience is immersive. I have been having lots of fun with this game. Hopefully, there'll be a sequel in the future. I definitely recommend it!

Please Crytek make a third one! Climbing in VR never gets old!
Perfect for untethered VR, you're really climbing! It's super immersive and so satisfying to play!
i like this game because i don't have to deal with a ton of kids on this game its a calm game especially the casual mode professional is also fun
I want a refund please
Not trying to be mean but whenever i play the grip hardly works and for some reason it kills me even though i didn't fall.
Climb
Extreme Challanges and beautiful Graphics

I like extreme things, however this game terrifies me. Maybe I'm afraid of heights, but after finishing the tutorial, I can't complete the first climb of "Alps" without freezing up due to terror and quitting the game immediately. I do okay until I have to look down while climbing, way up in the air...good exercise and fun too, I'll get through the first climb. Hopefully. Chat GPT outlined a plan of deep breathing and pausing when I get scared instead of quitting.
Brilliant challenging game, competitive and relaxing with the small bit of physicality with the realism to match!
Gets my hopes up but way to easy and add more maps like a pool or space

reviews.review_title: Must have game to show off VR
reviews.review_description:
This game is astounding and the gameplay showcases what VR is capable of. This is a great game to load up and hand the headset over to someone new. 

It can be played in a small area, enjoyed by adults and kids alike, and has some amazing visuals.
I LOVE THIS GAME but needs more climbs i beat it all in one day😭
I just got this game and it’s pretty fun but it gets your arms tired but overall it’s a great game.
It had good graphics but the gameplay is a bit repetitive but it is a parlour game so that is to be expected.

There bugs and i don't mean gliches i mean Flying bugs if u don't know what i mean i mean insects. So if u are scared of bugs (like me) DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY (i did 5✨ so i could get at the front if not the front close)
Loving this at the moment,spectacular views all round .
Me and my little brother and I both love it. I have no interest in real-life rock climbing, to be honest. This game, however, is awesome, and the devs get so many things right.
This games very cinematic

reviews.review_title: This game sucks so bad after a while
reviews.review_description: I played it for 2 days and it was really fun but then it started getting so boring its just eatting up space now way to boring do not get it
Very fun and realistic you will have fun

reviews.review_title: Will not play again, enjoyed my session
reviews.review_description:
When i joined the game it looked very fun. Graphics are beatifull and tutorial wasnt boring and explained it easily. 

My first climb was fun and i liked the surroundings.

Thats the good stuff but, for a climbing game the movement was limited. It was basic just placing your hands. They couldve done more but yeah. 

The animation for the stamina running out is minimal and doesnt change, theres no actual modes like placing safety, was expecting to be able to hang the clip to a vest but no, just a poorly made checkpoint, coulve made it very interactive and fun. 

I got this game for free via horizon plus, i wouldnt have bought it if i didnt have hp. Would not really recommend.

reviews.review_title: It won't let me play and i paid
reviews.review_description: Why won't let me play the game
This really helps me with my climbing skills and my anxiety levels great for calming down and very fun great views for the aesthetic ￼￼￼

I personally have played this game multiple times on other people's meta quest and everytime I really enjoyed it, but when I decided to pay the 24 pound to get it on my meta quest I was slightly dissapointed. The reason being was that I had played other games and really enjoyed them and I felt that the climb 2 just didn't compare. It is quite fun though if you just want to have a chill time playing by yourself. They really need to add a multiplayer option but I think they are adding one. The big question is is it worth 24 pounds and I think it really depends on what you have your vr for, because it can be really fun just to chill out. 

HOPE THIS HELPS😁
It’s realistic all it needs is multiplayer

Never really enjoyed this game. Nice graphics, but you don't really get to appreciate them because of the concentration it requires. The gameplay demands near-constant arm-raising, which quickly becomes physically exhausting, transforming what could have been an exhilarating game into a test of endurance. Compounding the frustration, the audio design feels jarring—my avatar’s incessant grunts, gasps, and grim sounds of struggle or demise (which, regrettably, dominate the experience) create a sense of relentless failure rather than fun.
We need more maps.

I've been playing this game because of Horizon plus and it's really enjoyable. I've completed all the levels and am now just playing for fun. Idk if I'll ever buy the full game but at least I can play for a free month.

As an indoor, outdoor trad and sport climber, I love this game. 
I wish I could do lead and clip ropes or place trad gear, but other than crossing hand its excellent. 
It's super challenging on pro.

reviews.review_title: It's a good gane when ur bored
reviews.review_description: I always cone back to this game when I have nothing else to play, not my 1st choice but also not my last. I think its a good game to be honest 8/10

For a game that’s *entirely* based on climbing, the climbing is a little on the mediocre side… it’s not BAD or anything, I’d just expect a little more if it’s the central premise of the game. The jumping mechanic is weird and janky especially if you try to swing your arms.. I find it downright unreliable that way. The graphics aren’t great, again not bad just, not great. The climbing itself… hard to describe just with words but it’s kinda all it has to be and not much more. There’s a stamina and chalking mechanic but if anything all that does is just kinda slow you down. It’s a decent enough time for a  quest+ title and if you’re afraid of heights it’s  sorta interesting.
After hearing about the rewis and playing the game my self its worth it 🥰😇😘😗😗☺️😛👟👟👑👑
Found it quite boring and somewhat annoying , climbing a rock face in VR is watching hands grab ledges over and over and over….just don’t do it for me

I would recommend this and I think it’s nice to do things that are challenging but also things you would never be able to do in real life

Both mechanics & gfx are outstanding!

I was really happy to see this game added to the plus library because it was one I wanted to try for sure. 
It's pretty cool. I haven't gotten that far in it because my hands sweaty a lot from my phobia but I think it's helping me get over that.

Really nice landscapes!

The first had a lot of bugs for me but this game is so much better there are less bugs and it has better levels.

There are lots of new options in this game and I love it must buy.
Very good graphics good climbing mechanics not too shabby but still good keep it up
Can’t remember the last time I had a game make my hands sweat. It’s pretty straightforward, all you do is climb. It’s a strange mix of relaxing and exhilarating. Nice change of pace from other games.

Very nice and scenic game with fun mechanics.

So I thought this would be a fun game to play since I'm way too scared to climb a mountain in real life. Lemme tell you, this game absolutely terrifies me. There's times I have to put the VR down and wait for my hands to stop sweating. There's multiple times I've audibly said, "please, please don't make me do this".  There's something anxiety inducing about having to dangle off a super sketchy mountain face and quickly chalk your hands, because you need all the grip stamina for the next part. What's really neat is as you go up in difficulty, the checkpoints get fewer and further between! So you really gotta be comfortable yeeting yourself into the void and hope you have enough momentum to clear the gap! If you're into giving yourself panic attacks, this game is for you.
